creator: dereks@lifeofadishwasher.com
text:
Created attachment 186181
Update to 1.9.0

Update mail/mutt to mutt 1.9.0
    
    - Update to 1.9.0 [1]
    - Remove PARENT_CHILD_MATCH_PATCH this is now part of upstream
     o See [2] for new syntax
    - Remove patch-smime-self
     o See [2] "Self encryption"
    - Latest vvv is 1.8.3
    - Current 1.8.3 NNTP patch is broken on 1.9.0
    - Remove pre-patch-NNTP-on vvv nntp patch no longer changes manual.txt
    
    [1] http://www.mutt.org/doc/UPDATING
    [2] http://www.mutt.org/relnotes/1.9/


https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12282
